# Woodpecker Guesthouse

> Comfortable guesthouse in Ficksburg, Free State, South Africa — private en-suite rooms, free WiFi, secure parking, and a hearty breakfast. Rated 8.8 "Fabulous" on Booking.com.

Woodpecker Guesthouse is a family-run guesthouse on Kort Street in Ficksburg, hosted by Wanda Du Toit. Rooms range from cosy economy twins to family suites with disability access, all with tea/coffee facilities and modern bathrooms. Guests enjoy a garden setting, outdoor fireplace, and easy access to Ficksburg town centre and the Golf Club.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the guesthouse, featured rooms, amenities, and guest ratings.
- [Rooms](/rooms): All room types with rates, bed configurations, and amenities.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos of rooms, gardens, breakfast, and surroundings.
- [About](/about): Our story, hosts, and what makes a stay with us special.
- [FAQ](/faq): Check-in times, breakfast, parking, pets, payment, and more.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, address, and enquiry form.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your personal information.
- [Terms](/terms): Booking, cancellation, and house rules.
